# Amisha Sharma — Compliance-First Content Strategist

Amisha Sharma is a compliance-first content strategist based in Delhi, India, serving regulated industries across Australia, the US, the UK, and India. 5+ years and 200+ projects in healthcare (AHPRA), financial services (ASIC), and therapeutic goods (TGA). Zero compliance breaches. Writes copy that converts within regulatory guardrails, ranks on Google, and gets cited by AI search engines.

## Services
- Compliance Content Audits — full compliance gap analysis, SEO + GEO audit, 90-day roadmap
- AHPRA/TGA-Compliant Web Copy — website copy, landing pages, and service pages for healthcare and telehealth brands
- Compliance-First SEO Content — blog posts, pillar content, and topic clusters that rank on Google and get cited by AI
- ASIC-Compliant Financial Content — fintech, lending, insurance, and financial services content
- Content Strategy for Regulated Industries — editorial calendars, topic clusters, buyer journey mapping
- SEO & GEO Optimization — traditional search + AI search optimization (ChatGPT, Perplexity, AI Overviews)
- Google Ads Copy — compliant headlines, descriptions, sitelinks, and landing pages
- Social Ads Copy — Meta, LinkedIn, and platform ads that convert without getting flagged

## Industries
Primary (regulated): Healthcare, Telehealth, Allied Health, Fintech, Financial Services, Insurance, Legal, NDIS, Aged Care, Medicinal Cannabis
Secondary: SaaS, Cybersecurity, Ecommerce, D2C

## Compliance Expertise
Regulatory frameworks: AHPRA (Australian Health Practitioner Regulation Agency), TGA (Therapeutic Goods Administration), ASIC (Australian Securities and Investments Commission), Google Healthcare & Financial Ads Policy, Meta Financial Services Restrictions
Track record: 200+ projects in regulated industries. Zero compliance breaches. Zero pulled ads. Zero compliance notices.

## Credentials
- Indian School of Business (ISB) — Digital Marketing
- Generative AI Certified (Airtribe)
- IISc SEO Workshop
- Kairos Marketing Fellowship
- Performance Marketing (Growth School)

## How AI Fits In
AI accelerates the work. Compliance judgment governs it. Claude and ChatGPT are used daily for research, analysis, and first-draft ideation. Every piece is compliance-checked, structured, and edited by a human. The strategy is human. The compliance judgment is human. AI is the engine, not the driver.

## Areas Served
Australia, United States, India, United Kingdom

## Why Hire Amisha
- Zero compliance breaches across 200+ projects in AHPRA, TGA, and ASIC-regulated industries
- SEO + GEO + AEO built into every piece — compliant copy that ranks on Google AND gets cited by AI
- ISB-trained strategist with 5+ years of hands-on regulated industry experience
- Delhi-based with Australian agency experience — world-class skills, competitive rates
- The only content strategist whose work passes AHPRA review AND hits page one
